nasb.text: Make supplication to the Lord, for there has been enough of God’s thunder and hail; and I will let you go, and you shall stay no longer.”

esv.text: Plead with the Lord, for there has been enough of God’s thunder and hail. I will let you go, and you shall stay no longer.”

cnv.text: 請你們祈求耶和華吧，因為這雷聲和冰雹已經夠了；我決意讓你們離開，你們不可再留在這裡。”

ccb.text: 请你们向耶和华祷告，好止住雷电和冰雹。我准许以色列人出去，你们不必再留在这里了。”
